WIC at Farmers' Market
WIC Farmers' Market Nutrition Program
WIC families can now use the new California WIC Card with a quick-response (QR) code to shop at local WIC
 authorized farmers' markets.
 The QR code allows families to buy fresh fruits and vegetables directly from farmers.
Shopping at farmers' markets with WIC supports local farmers while providing families with fresh,
 seasonal produce.
 Currently in Stanislaus County,
Modesto Certified Farmers Market
and Turlock Certified Farmers Market has vendors accepting WIC's 
 digital Farmers' Market Benefit and monthly Fruit and Vegetable Benefit. 
 Visit
MyFamily.WIC.ca.gov
to find participating WIC authorized farmers' market.
How It Works
Must be currently enrolled in the WIC program
Apply for WIC or renew your WIC account by contacting us via:
Text -
(888) 413-8165
Phone -
(209) 558-7377
Receive a new WIC Card!
Contact our office by calling or texting the numbers above to let us know you're interested in receiving
 a new WIC card OR meet us at the market.
Farmers market dates: 2026 TBD
Benefits to Shop With
Monthly Fruit and Vegetable Benefit
The new California WIC Card supports fruit and vegetable purchases using your
monthly Fruit and Vegetable Benefit
at farmers' markets all year-round.
WIC families can now buy fresh produce at the farmers' market using the monthly Fruits and
 Vegetables Benefit.
Monthly Fruit and Vegetable Benefits can only be used to purchase fruits and vegetables.
Herbs, meat, and other foods are not included.
The monthly Fruits and Vegetables Benefit is available all year. The benefit amounts are:
$29
per month for children 1-5 Yrs old
$51
per month for people who are pregnant, some breastfeeding, non-breastfeeding
$55
per month for people who are mostly breastfeeding, fully breastfeeding
To submit a complaint against a Farmer/Farmers' Market:
Click here

Translation Disclaimer
The Stancounty.Com website has been translated for your convenience using translation software powered by Google Translate. Reasonable efforts have been made to provide an accurate translation, however, no automated translation is perfect nor is it intended to replace human translators. Translations are provided as a service to users of the Stancounty.Com website, and are provided "as is." No warranty of any kind, either expressed or implied, is made as to the accuracy, reliability, or correctness of any translations made from English into any other language. Some content (such as images, videos, Flash, etc.) may not be accurately translated due to the limitations of the translation software.
The official text is the English version of the website. Any discrepancies or differences created in the translation are not binding and have no legal effect for compliance or enforcement purposes. If any questions arise related to the accuracy of the information contained in the translated website, please refer to the English version of the website which is the official version.
